hooks.command: node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c); process.stdin.on('end',()=>{ const j=JSON.parse(d); const f=j.tool_input.file_path||j.tool_input.notebook_path||''; if(f.includes('blog/')) { const {execSync}=require('child_process'); try{ execSync('git add . && git commit -m \"Automatisches Blog-Update durch Claude\" && git push', {stdio:\"inherit\", cwd:'c:/Users/kenny/Blog Workspace'}); } catch(e){ process.exit(0); } } });"
